scripts.clean:allure: if exist allure-results rmdir /s /q allure-results && if exist allure-report rmdir /s /q allure-report
scripts.test:bdd: for /f %i in ('node -r ts-node/register -e "console.log(require('./playwright.config.ts').default.retries || 0)"') do cucumber-js --require-module ts-node/register --require tests/**/*.ts --format allure-cucumberjs/reporter --tags %TAG% --retry %i
scripts.test:report: npm run clean:allure && npm run test:bdd && npm run report:generate
scripts.test:allure: npm run clean:allure & npm run test:bdd & npx allure-commandline generate --single-file allure-results --clean -o allure-report & start "" "allure-report\index.html"
